zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Longford於大約1365年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾內維爾 霍爾特時，她的父親Nicholas de Longford III15歲，母親Margery Sulney32歲。她於大約1385年與Robert de Neville在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年之後在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Longford于大约1365年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾內維爾 霍爾特时，她的父亲Nicholas de Longford III15岁，母亲Margery Sulney32岁。她于大约1385年与Robert de Neville在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年之后在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Langford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Longford was born about 1365, in Nevill Holt, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas de Longford III, was 15 and her mother, Margery Sulney, was 32. She married Robert de Neville about 1385, in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1409, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Longford est née environ 1365, à Nevill Holt, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Longford III, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margery Sulney, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Neville environ 1385, à Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1409, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1385 in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Longford è nata il circa 1365 nel Nevill Holt, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Nicholas de Longford III, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Margery Sulney, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Neville circa 1385, nel Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1409, nel Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Longfordが約1365年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアネヴィル ホルトで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Longford IIIは15歳，母Margery Sulneyは32歳であった。約1385年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ハーボロウでRobert de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年以後にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Longford(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 네비 홀트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Longford III(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Sulney(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 하르버루그h에서 Robert de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Longford nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Nevill Holt, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Longford III, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Margery Sulney, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Neville aproximadamente 1385, em Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Longford родилась около 1365 г. в местности невилл холт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Longford III было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Sulney, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Neville около 1385 г. в местности маркет харбороую, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1409 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
